mapper.select:
SELECT A.id AS id, A.content AS content, A.worker AS worker, A.server AS server, A.system AS system
, coalesce("${item}".is_checked, '0') AS "${item}"
FROM rca.tb_distribute_checklist A
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT B.id AS id, B.checklist_id AS checklist_id, B.deploy_id AS deploy_id, B.is_checked AS is_checked, C.check_date AS check_date FROM rca.tb_deploy_check B LEFT OUTER JOIN rca.tb_deploy_date C ON B.deploy_id = C.id ) "${item}" ON A.id = "${item}".checklist_id AND "${item}".check_date = '${item}'
ORDER BY A.id
